name: Spaghetti Florentine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente.
2. In a bowl, mix cottage cheese and ¼ cup grated Parmesan cheese.
3. Place half of the cooked spaghetti in a 10" x 6-inch baking dish.
4. Cover with spinach, cottage cheese mixture, and half of the mozzarella cheese.
5. Top with remaining spaghetti and sauce.
6. Cut remaining mozzarella into ½-inch strips and arrange to form a lattice design.
7. Sprinkle with the remaining Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until bubbly and golden brown.
